ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "fee" REAL /* Fee for the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the course was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the course was last updated */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the course in hours */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the course (e.g., online, offline, hybrid) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_offerings" (
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course offering */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being offered */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course offering */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course offering */,
  "meeting_time" TEXT /* Meeting time of the course offering */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the course offering */,
  "seats_available" INTEGER /* Number of seats available for the course offering */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students for the course offering */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the instructor */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the instructor */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_instructors" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the instructor in the course (e.g., lead instructor, assistant instructor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id", "instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the student */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the student */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the student */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course offering */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course offering */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, inactive, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("offering_id") REFERENCES course_offerings ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "method" TEXT /* Payment method (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course material */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., video, document, presentation) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_materials_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "assignment_type" TEXT /* Type of assignment (e.g., quiz, project, essay) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the assignment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the submission was made */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the submission */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the submission (e.g., submitted, graded, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submission */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade received for the submission */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided for the submission */,
  "graded_at" TEXT /* Date the grade was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES submissions ("submission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "certification_date" TEXT /* Date the student received certification */,
  "credential" TEXT /* Credential awarded to the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certifications_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certifications_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Feedback text provided by the student */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the student (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sender */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)
